raw_script:
Create a 30-second educational video script about renewable energy.

Structure it as 3 scenes:

SCENE 1: Modern classroom with teacher and students
NARRATOR: Welcome to our renewable energy lesson. Today we'll explore how clean energy powers our future.

SCENE 2: Solar panels on rooftop with bright sunlight
NARRATOR: Solar panels convert sunlight directly into electricity using photovoltaic technology.

SCENE 3: Wind turbines on green hills with blue sky
NARRATOR:  Wind turbines harness the power of wind, spinning blades to generate clean energy.

NARRATOR: These are just two examples of many types of renewable energy that help protect our planet for generations to come. Now let's discuss further in class! [FADE OUT]

Let me know if you need any other assistance with your project! I'm happy to help refine or expand on this concept. The goal

scenes.background_description: Modern classroom with teacher and students, educational posters about renewable energy
scenes.dialogue: Welcome to our renewable energy lesson. Today we'll explore how clean energy powers our future.

scenes.background_description: Solar panels on sunny rooftop with bright blue sky and sunlight rays
scenes.dialogue: Solar panels convert sunlight directly into electricity using photovoltaic technology.

scenes.background_description: Wind turbines on green hills with blue sky and flowing clouds
scenes.dialogue: Wind turbines harness the power of moving air to generate clean, sustainable electricity.
